papers.title: AQR-HNSW: Accelerating Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search via Density-aware Quantization and Multi-stage Re-ranking
papers.abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) search has become fundamental to modern AI infrastructure, powering recommendation systems, search engines, and large language models across industry leaders from Google to OpenAI.
